top_signals.title: How Japan created its naphtha supply bottleneck
top_signals.summary: With no end in sight for the Iran war, supply chain bottlenecks for the oil-derived material are set to continue, prompting calls for government-enforced energy saving measures.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Hillhouse Nears Stake Purchase in Goldman-Backed LRQA
top_signals.summary: Hillhouse Investment is close to buying a significant minority stake in UK-based certifications and inspections business LRQA from Goldman Sachs Group Inc.’s asset management arm, according to people familiar with the matter.

top_signals.title: The dollar’s decline is overstated — but still real

top_signals.title: China's nuclear power capacity nearly doubled since 2016
top_signals.summary: From 2016 to 2024, China's nuclear generation capacity increased 76% (24 GW), based on our International Energy Statistics (IES) data. According to the International Atomic Energy Agency's Power Reactor Information System (PRIS), China added an additional 1.1 GW of nuclear power capacity in 2025 and 2.2 GW in 2026 (through May). China is continuing to build out its nuclear generating capacity and has 36 reactors under construction, accounting for more than 49% of total world nuclear construction, according to PRIS.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: JPMorgan, Citi-backed Clearing House plans tokenized deposit network in 2027: WSJ
top_signals.summary: Some of the largest banks are reportedly launching a tokenized deposit network in early 2027 in response to growing competition from stablecoin companies entering TradFi.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Anthropic says self-improving AI may be closer than expected
top_signals.summary: Companies have been developing AI very quickly to stay ahead of the market, but Favaro and Clark argue that a slowdown would allow more time to deal with the technology’s implications.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

alerts.title: LivaNova Appoints Anne Liddy as Chief Legal Officer
alerts.summary: LivaNova PLC (Nasdaq: LIVN), a market-leading medical technology company, today announced the appointment of Anne Liddy as Chief Legal Officer, effective August 31. Liddy will oversee the Company’s global legal and compliance function and serve as a member of the Executive Leadership Team. Liddy brings more than two decades of experience advising global healthcare and [...]

alerts.title: House GOP eyes summer vote on prediction market restrictions for lawmakers
alerts.summary: House Republicans plan a summer vote on a congressional stock trading ban and new restrictions on lawmakers’ prediction market activity.
